category_sources: source_facts.description says Material Design theme for MkDocs; official Material for MkDocs site describes creating documentation sites from Markdown.
display_name_sources: Official documentation site and GitHub repository use the project name Material for MkDocs; source_facts.name gives the package name mkdocs-material.
docs_sources: Dedicated official documentation site for Material for MkDocs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official documentation footer links to Material for MkDocs on GitHub, and GitHub About links back to squidfunk.github.io/mkdocs-material/.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official documentation and GitHub About topics describe documentation, MkDocs, Material Design themeing, Markdown, and framework use.
